title: Sum Array
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an array of numbers and returns their sum.
hint: Try using a loop to iterate through the array and accumulate the total, or use the built-in reduce method.

title: Nth Fibonacci
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an integer N and returns the Nth Fibonacci number. (Assume solve(0) = 0, solve(1) = 1)
hint: You can solve this using recursion, but recursion is slow. Try using a loop to build up to the Nth number starting from 0 and 1.

title: Palindrome String
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns true if it is a palindrome, and false otherwise.
hint: A string is a palindrome if it reads the same forwards and backwards. Try reversing the string and comparing it to the original.

title: Factorial
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a non-negative integer N and returns N! (N factorial). solve(0) = 1.
hint: Factorial of N is N * (N-1) * ... * 1. You can write a loop from 1 to N and multiply a running product.

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns it reversed.
hint: Start an empty string and iterate over the input string backwards, appending characters to your new string.

title: Count Vowels
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in it.
hint: Create a string or array containing 'aeiou'. Loop through the input string and increment a counter if the character is in your vowels list.

title: Max in Array
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an array of numbers and returns the maximum value.
hint: Initialize a max variable to the first element (or negative infinity). Iterate through the array and update max if you find a larger element.
